summary: Wedding/event venue website for Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall. Project includes navigation links for About Us, Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar and Conference sections, WhatsApp contact numbers, and venue address.

existing_features.title: Add navigation links in both the desktop and mobile menus (SiteHeader.tsx) for the following sections: About Us, Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference. Each link must smooth-scroll to the corresponding section anchor on the page.

Create or ensure the existence of the six page sections referenced by the new nav links: Our Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar & Conference (About Us already exists). Each missing section should be added as a distinct, styled section component and rendered in App.tsx in a logical order. Sections should have matching id anchors (e.g., id="banquet", id="specialist", id="decor", id="event", id="seminar-conference").

Add a second WhatsApp number (9794416439) to the BRAND constants (brand.ts) and display it alongside the existing WhatsApp number in the ContactBookingSection and SiteFooter. Label it clearly (e.g., 'WhatsApp 2' or a secondary contact label).
Update the venue address in brand.ts and all display locations (SiteFooter, ContactBookingSection) to: Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall, Dughara Chauraha, Rajwal Road, Khajani, Gorakhpur, UP – 273211.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add navigation links for About Us, Banquet, Specialist, Decor, Event, Seminar and Conference pages/sections
Add WhatsApp number 9794416439 to contact section
Add address: Avsar Vatika Marriage Hall, Dughara Chauraha, Rajwal Road, Khajani, Gorakhpur, UP - 273211
